description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical woven basket made from natural plant fibers, likely seagrass or rattan, with a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The basket features two thick, braided handles attached to the rim, allowing for easy carrying. Its body is constructed from tightly interlaced strands, creating a sturdy yet flexible structure with visible texture and color variation. The coloration transitions from darker brown at the base to lighter beige tones toward the top, giving it a natural gradient effect. The rim is reinforced with a thicker braided band, and the handles are integrated into the weave for added strength. The interior is open and spacious, suitable for holding various items such as laundry, garden produce, or miscellaneous urban materials.
description: A tall, cylindrical woven basket with braided handles and a natural gradient from dark brown to beige, featuring a textured, hand-crafted look.
description_view_0: The basket is seen with its darker brown side facing forward, showing both braided handles and the reinforced rim.
description_view_1: This view highlights the mid-tone brown side, with both handles visible and the weave pattern clearly shown.
description_view_2: The lighter beige side of the basket is prominent, with the texture and weave details more visible in the brighter coloration.
description_view_3: The lightest side of the basket is shown, emphasizing the pale beige tones and the braided handles against the rim.
